named-native-query.name: Vendas.totalPorMes
named-native-query.query: SELECT TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', data_criacao), 'YYYY/MM') AS mes, COUNT(*) AS total FROM venda WHERE data_criacao >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 months' AND status = 'EMITIDA' GROUP BY date_trunc('month', data_criacao) ORDER BY date_trunc('month', data_criacao) DESC;

named-native-query.name: Vendas.porOrigem
named-native-query.query: SELECT to_char(v.data_criacao, 'YYYY/MM') AS mes, SUM(CASE WHEN c.origem = 'NACIONAL' THEN i.quantidade ELSE 0 END) AS total_nacional, SUM(CASE WHEN c.origem = 'INTERNACIONAL' THEN i.quantidade ELSE 0 END) AS total_internacional FROM venda v JOIN item_venda i ON i.codigo_venda = v.codigo JOIN cerveja c ON i.codigo_cerveja = c.codigo WHERE v.data_criacao > NOW() - INTERVAL '6 months' AND v.status = 'EMITIDA' GROUP BY to_char(v.data_criacao, 'YYYY/MM') ORDER BY mes DESC;
